text:
EXPLANATION: This reference is a well-known dataset published by Daniel Lowe on Figshare. It is not an academic paper, but a valid, widely cited dataset in cheminformatics and machine learning for chemistry.
LINK: https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Chemical_reactions_from_US_patents_1976-Sep2016_/5104873
FOUND_TITLE: Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)
FOUND_AUTHORS: Daniel Lowe
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
